meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Glaze by Raycast
products.tagline: Create your own Mac apps by chatting with AI
products.summaryZh: 通过AI对话创建你自己的Mac应用
products.descriptionZh: Glaze 是将创意转化为 Mac 应用的最简单方式。描述你的需求，它就能构建一个真实的应用，驻留在你的程序坞中，即时启动，离线可用，并充分发挥你电脑的全部性能。软件终于变得个性化，围绕你而塑造。来自 Raycast 的开发者。
products.description: Glaze is the easiest way to go from an idea to a Mac app. Describe what you want, and it builds a real app that lives in your dock, launches instantly, works offline, and taps into the full power of your computer. Software that's finally personal, shaped around you. From the makers of Raycast.

products.name: Goals from Loops
products.tagline: Measure whether a campaign drove the desired outcome
products.summaryZh: 衡量广告活动是否达成了预期效果
products.descriptionZh: Goals from Loops 让 SaaS 团队衡量营销活动是否真正推动了他们关心的结果。选择转化目标，确定衡量对象，设置归因窗口，即可在 Loops 中直接查看转化数、注册数和展示次数。
products.description: Goals from Loops lets SaaS teams measure whether a campaign actually drove the outcome they care about. Pick a conversion target, choose who should be measured, set an attribution window, and see conversions, enrollments, and impressions right inside Loops.

products.name: Tamamon
products.tagline: A desktop pet that grows as you code with Claude Code
products.summaryZh: 桌面宠物，随你使用Claude Code编程而成长
products.descriptionZh: Tamamon 是一款 macOS 桌面宠物，栖息在屏幕顶端，随着你使用 Claude Code 构建项目而成长。功能包括：- 每周扭蛋可收集 20 个物种，每个物种拥有独特的进化形态与习性- 可喂食、玩耍（球、泡泡），并装饰其栖息地- 响应实时时间与天气——下雨或入夜时，宠物会回家休息- 一切数据均保留在你的 Mac 上。无需账户、无需登录、无追踪、无上传。
products.description: Tamamon is a macOS desktop pet that lives on top of your screen and grows the more you build with Claude Code. What it does: - 20 species to collect through a weekly gacha, each with its own evolved forms and quirks - Feed it, play (ball, bubbles), and decorate its habitat - Reacts to real time and weather — when it rains or night falls, your pet heads home to rest - Nothing leaves your Mac. No account, no sign-in, no tracking, nothing uploaded.

products.name: Archify
products.tagline: understand software
products.summaryZh: 理解软件
products.descriptionZh: 在浏览器中直接查看组件、API、库，理解应用行为。
products.description: See components, APIs, libraries, understand application behavior directly inside your browser.

products.name: nxt
products.tagline: Talk to your to do list and get what's next
products.summaryZh: 与你的待办清单对话，获取下一步行动。
products.descriptionZh: nxt 是一款能用自然语言像人类助手一样交流的AI任务管理器。用大白话把想法一股脑倒出来——nxt能读懂言外之意，自动提取任务、推断优先级并归档整理。它理解的是你的真实意图，而非字面表述。nxt会学习你的个人情境，让任务随生活灵活调整。当你准备行动时，nxt会过滤干扰信息，只给你一个清晰的任务和一条行动理由。无需翻页、无需纠结、无需面对令人窒息的任务清单。
products.description: nxt is the AI task manager you talk to like a human assistant. Brain-dump your thoughts in plain language - nxt reads between the lines, extracts tasks, infers priorities, and files everything automatically. It understands what you mean, not just what you say. nxt learns your personal context, so your tasks flex around your life. When you're ready to act, nxt cuts through the noise and gives you one clear task, one reason why. No scrolling, no paralysis, no overwhelming list to wade through.

products.name: Vox
products.tagline: Voice in, voice out — with GitHub Copilot
products.summaryZh: 语音输入，语音输出——由 GitHub Copilot 实现
products.descriptionZh: Vox 是 GitHub Copilot CLI 的扩展：输入 /vox 后，一个响应式监听球会在独立窗口中打开。说出你的指令，聆听代理回复。语音输入，语音输出——支持 Windows、macOS 和 Linux。
products.description: Vox is a GitHub Copilot CLI extension: run /vox and a reactive listening orb opens in its own window. Speak your turn, hear the agent reply. Voice in, voice out — on Windows, macOS, and Linux.

products.name: Pixel Machha
products.tagline: Photos from Camera to your Guests in lightening speed !
products.summaryZh: 从相机到宾客，照片传输快如闪电！
products.descriptionZh: Pixel Machha为活动摄影师和社交媒体提供专业平台——支持FTP相机上传、AI人脸识别、品牌化宾客相册、社交媒体专属编辑与导出，以及实时幻灯片播放。所有功能集成于一处。
products.description: Pixel Machha gives event photographers and social media a professional platform — FTP camera uploads, AI face recognition, branded guest albums, Social Media specific editing and exporting, and live slideshows. All in one place.

products.name: JoJo Days
products.tagline: The baby book you'll actually keep
products.summaryZh: 你会真正保留的育儿书
products.descriptionZh: JoJo Days 是一款私密、有趣的宝宝成长记录与数字回忆册。从孕期开始，设有预产期倒计时，随后可保存从孕肚到孩子长大成人的每一条笔记、照片和视频。
products.description: JoJo Days is a private, playful baby journal and digital memory book. Start during pregnancy with a due-date countdown, then keep every note, photo, and video - from the bump to the grown-up years.

products.name: OneShots
products.tagline: OneShots - 10s create amazing APP screenshots
products.summaryZh: OneShots - 10秒生成惊艳的APP截图
products.descriptionZh: OneShots 是将应用截图转化为商店级营销素材的最快方式。上传原始截图、选择模板、自定义文本和品牌元素——然后在10秒内导出所有设备尺寸和所有语言版本。你会爱上它的理由：⚡ 10秒完成，而非“几分钟内” 🎯 一次编辑，处处生效 📱 专为应用商店打造 🌍 支持多语言 📦 批量高清导出 🎨 高转化率模板 无需Figma。无需外包。无需手动调整尺寸。👉 立即免费试用OneShots — https://oneshots.cc
products.description: OneShots is the fastest way to turn your app screenshots into store-ready marketing visuals. Upload raw screenshots, pick a template, customize text and branding — then export all device sizes and all languages in 10 seconds. Why you'll love it: ⚡ 10 seconds, not "in minutes" 🎯 One edit, everywhere 📱 Built for app stores 🌍 Multi-language ready 📦 Bulk HD export 🎨 Templates that convert No Figma. No freelancers. No manual resizing. 👉 Try OneShots free today — https://oneshots.cc

products.name: tasktrack
products.tagline: just type what you did. look back anytime.
products.summaryZh: 只需输入你做了什么。随时可以回顾。
products.descriptionZh: 为记不清上周二做了什么的人准备的极简工作日志。没有项目、看板、下拉菜单——只有一个文本框。输入你做了什么，回车，完成。需要回忆时随时滚动查看，写状态更新，或填写你一直回避的绩效评估。
products.description: A minimal work log for people who forget what they did last Tuesday. No projects, no boards, no dropdowns — just a text box. Type what you did, hit enter, done. Scroll back whenever you need to remember, write a status update, or fill out that performance review you've been avoiding.

products.name: SyncBooster
products.tagline: Create and publish social media posts via AI chat
products.summaryZh: 通过AI聊天创建并发布社交媒体帖子
products.descriptionZh: SyncBooster是一款AI聊天工具，专为小型服务企业创建并发布社交媒体帖子。发送一张照片和简短说明，即可获得包含文案、话题标签和行动号召的定制帖子——在聊天中确认后，即可一次性发布到Facebook、Instagram、LinkedIn和Google Business。内置AI图片工作室、素材库和帖子历史记录。无需仪表盘，无需复杂表单——只需一次对话。
products.description: SyncBooster is an AI chat that creates and publishes social media posts for small service businesses. Send a photo and a short note, get a ready post with copy, hashtags and CTA tailored to your brand - then confirm in chat to publish across Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn and Google Business at once. Includes an AI image studio, asset gallery, and post history. No dashboards, no complicated forms - just a conversation.

products.name: AISight
products.tagline: Understand how AI answer engines see your website
products.summaryZh: 了解AI回答引擎如何看待你的网站
products.descriptionZh: AISight分析AI爬虫访问、语义结构、引用就绪度和证据质量，然后为任何公开网站生成一份包含优先级发现和可复制粘贴技术修复方案的高管报告。
products.description: AISight analyzes AI crawler access, semantic structure, citation readiness and evidence quality, then generates an executive report with prioritized findings and copy-paste technical fixes for any public website.

products.name: Time Left
products.tagline: Track your life in weeks and meaningful moments
products.summaryZh: 以周为单位记录生活与有意义的时刻
products.descriptionZh: Time Left 是一款 iOS 生命日历应用，将你剩余的周数转化为简洁的可视化时间轴。你可以添加过去与未来的时刻，个性化主屏幕与锁屏小组件，并将个人数据存储在本地。
products.description: Time Left is an iOS life calendar that turns your remaining weeks into a simple visual timeline. Add past and future moments, personalize Home Screen and Lock Screen widgets, and keep your personal data stored locally.

products.name: Cited
products.tagline: Investor answers for NIFTY 50, every claim cited
products.summaryZh: NIFTY 50 投资者问答，每项声明均有出处
products.descriptionZh: Cited 将 Claude 连接到印度 NIFTY 50 官方投资者文件、财报电话会议回放及文字记录、KPI 数据手册、投资者演示文稿和年度报告。用简单英语提问，Claude 会读取实际文档，然后给出精确数字或引用；每个结论都会注明来源。无需再翻阅 PDF 或反复核对数据。几秒钟内即可将其添加为自定义连接器。免费，无需注册。每个答案都可信任和验证。
products.description: Cited connects Claude to official Indian NIFTY 50 investor filings, earnings call replays and transcripts, KPI data books, investor presentations, and annual reports. Ask anything in plain English and Claude reads the actual document, then answers with the exact figure or quote; every claim cited back to its source. No more digging through PDFs or second-guessing numbers. Add it as a Custom Connector in seconds. Free, no account needed. Every answer you can trust and verify.

products.name: GenMB
products.tagline: AI app builder with a real backend and automations
products.summaryZh: AI应用构建器，配备真实后端与自动化功能
products.descriptionZh: GenMB 将纯英文提示转化为完整、可部署的 Web 应用：包含前端、后端函数、数据库和身份验证。不仅如此，它还能超越生成功能——通过可视化工作流构建器（20 多种节点类型）、按 cron 计划运行 Python 的定时代理、Telegram/Slack/Email 聊天代理，以及覆盖 15 个类别的 80 种集成，实现应用的自动化。免费版每日提供 8 个积分和一个真实的 Postgres 数据库，无需绑定银行卡。
products.description: GenMB turns a plain-English prompt into a complete, deployed web app: frontend, backend functions, database, and auth included. Then it goes further than generation - automate your app with a visual workflow builder (20+ node types), scheduled agents that run Python on cron, chat agents on Telegram/Slack/Email, and 80 integrations across 15 categories. Free tier includes 8 credits a day and a real Postgres database, no card required.

products.name: Alvoff Inference - Fast, cheap STT · TTS
products.tagline: AI inference based out of India
products.summaryZh: 基于印度的AI推理
products.descriptionZh: Alvoff Inference 提供基于印度的低成本、可靠的语音转文本和文本转语音 API。我们致力于成为语音推理的一站式解决方案。我们的基础设施专为音频工作负载设计，相比通用云服务商，延迟更低、成本更优。您可在平台注册，免费获得价值 5 美元的推理服务。
products.description: Alvoff Inference provides cheap and reliable API for speech-to-text, text-to-speech based out of India. We aim to be the one stop solution for voice related inference. Our infrastructure is purpose-built for audio workloads, which means low latency and lower cost compared to general-purpose cloud providers. You can signup on the platform and get $5 of inference for free.

products.name: Comparoo
products.tagline: Ride apps are counting on you not to compare.
products.summaryZh: 出行应用指望你不去比较。
products.descriptionZh: 印度每个打车应用当前对同一行程的定价各不相同。你只看到了其中一家。这些应用的设计初衷就是让你打开即用、用完即走。没人告诉你，同一路线Rapido便宜了80卢比。Comparoo对比Uber、Ola、Rapido和Namma Yatri的真实价格，匹配相同车型，让你一键预订最便宜的选择。你的实际价格，已包含折扣。四个应用。一个屏幕。始终最低价。生鲜和配送服务即将上线。
products.description: Every ride app in India has a different price for your trip right now. You're only seeing one of them. The apps are designed to be your first tap and your last. Nobody told you Rapido was ₹80 cheaper for the same route. Comparoo compares real prices across Uber, Ola, Rapido and Namma Yatri, matches the same ride type, and lets you book the cheapest in one tap. Your actual price, discounts included. Four apps. One screen. Always the lowest price. Groceries and delivery are coming next.

products.name: SharePrompt
products.tagline: Turn your best prompts into beautiful, shareable images
products.summaryZh: 将你的最佳提示词转化为精美、可分享的图像
products.descriptionZh: 好的提示值得更好的呈现，而非截图。选择一张卡片，模仿你最喜欢的AI聊天界面（Claude、ChatGPT、Gemini、Perplexity、Manus，或自定义），写下你的提示，挑选一个暖色渐变，导出清晰的PNG。无需账户，无需注册，完全免费。
products.description: Great prompts deserve better than screenshots. Pick a card that mimics your favorite AI's chat box (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Manus, or your own), write your prompt, pick a warm gradient, and export a crisp PNG. No accounts, no sign-up, free.

products.name: Notta Desktop - Privacy Mode
products.tagline: Offline AI meeting notes with unlimited transcription
products.summaryZh: 离线AI会议纪要，支持无限转录
products.descriptionZh: 使用Notta桌面版，在本地录制并转录私人会议。隐私模式可将音频、转录文本和会议记录保留在您的电脑上，支持离线转录，无需云端处理。免费试用7天，无需信用卡。
products.description: Record and transcribe private meetings locally with Notta Desktop. Privacy Mode keeps audio, transcripts, and meeting notes on your computer, with offline transcription and no cloud processing. Try it free for 7 days. No credit card required.

products.name: Subhive
products.tagline: Every subscription. One hive.
products.summaryZh: 所有订阅。一个蜂巢。
products.descriptionZh: 在一个简洁的仪表盘中，追踪你以任何货币支付的所有订阅。了解真实的月度支出，再也不会被续费打个措手不及。
products.description: Track every subscription you pay for, in any currency, all in one clean dashboard. Know your true monthly spend, and never get caught off guard by a renewal.
